properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Joys are flowing like a river Since the Comforter has come He abides with us for ever Makes the trusting heart His home

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Blessed quietness, holy quietness What assurance in my soul On the stormy sea Jesus speaks to me And the billows cease too roll.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Everything is turned to gladness All around this glorious guest Banished unbelief and sadness All is perfect peace and rest.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Like the rain that falls from heaven Like the sunlight from the sky So the Holy Ghost He’s given Falls upon us from on high.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: What a wonderful salvation Where we always see His face What a peaceful habitation What a quiet resting place.
